form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. His previous first-up run was successful when he posted a big 4 m win (Fr1) at this track (2:03.00) beating Lil's Super Tom in 2YONW1PMCD on July 9 at $6.90. Prefer him later in the campaign.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 7th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track, beaten 45 m by Bluebird Kazoom (1:58.30) in FMNW1PMLC on April 8 at $69.50. The run previous 5th (Sr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 35 m by Bluebird Kazoom (1:59.30) in NW1PMCD on March 31 at $6.80. Finds a nice race to rediscover her best form.
